title: rubus alterniflorus var. clavaudii
intro: Rubus alterniflorus var. clavaudii, also known as the Clavaud's blackberry, is a variety of the blackberry plant that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus alterniflorus var. clavaudii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
